block.forgemaster.attacca_shard.desc: A small fragment of a once great sword
item.forgemaster.broken_attacca.desc: Half of the legendary sword, the lone gear clicks loudly without its partner
item.forgemaster.vulcanite_nugget.desc: A foreign ore that radiates a faint heat
item.forgemaster.vulcanite_ingot.desc: An ingot of a mysterious ore, the strong heat it radiates makes it hard to handle for too long
enchantment.forgemaster.affannato.desc: Allows you to use charge from your opponent taking fire damage to shoot fireballs, filling the area with greek fire
enchantment.forgemaster.comodo_con_fuoco: Grants you the coolant effect when you attack, preventing you from being set on fire
advancements.forgemaster.get_shard.title: Shard of Flames
advancements.forgemaster.get_shard.descr: Find a Shard of Attacca in a meteorite
advancements.forgemaster.get_broken_blad: Reforge half of the shattered blade, Attacca
advancements.forgemaster.get_vulcanite_n: One Step Forward, Two Steps Back
Obtain a Vulcanite nugget from Blackstone
%1$s was unable to make it to the party because of %2$s
